name: The Ultimate Small Business AI Toolkit
description: The all-in-one AI prompt toolkit for small business owners. Covers marketing, sales, customer service, operations, HR, finance, and more — everything you need to start using AI across your entire business.

name: The Complete Accountants & Bookkeepers AI Toolkit
description: 150+ AI prompts for accountants, bookkeepers, and finance professionals — client communications, bookkeeping processes, tax and compliance, practice management, business advisory, and more. Works with ChatGPT, Claude & Gemini.

overview.intro: Running an accountancy or bookkeeping practice means juggling client communications, compliance deadlines, advisory work, and day-to-day admin — often all at once. This toolkit gives you 150+ ready-to-use AI prompts that handle the writing, thinking, and drafting so you can focus on the work that actually needs your expertise. Every prompt is written in plain English, designed for UK practices, and works with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or any other AI tool. Just pick a prompt, fill in the bracketed placeholders with your own details, paste it into your AI tool, and you'll have a professional first draft in seconds.

sections.title: Client Communication
sections.description: 15 prompts covering welcome letters, year-end reminders, fee increase letters, late document chasers, tax return notifications, VAT registration advice, onboarding questionnaires, dormant company reminders, CGT planning letters, business sale guidance, MTD updates, and payroll year-end letters.

sections.title: Bookkeeping & Accounts
sections.description: 15 prompts for step-by-step bookkeeping processes and guides — keeping records accurate, compliant, and audit-ready.

sections.title: Tax & Compliance
sections.description: 20 prompts covering tax planning, compliance guides, HMRC regulatory frameworks, and advisory content for you and your clients.

sections.title: Practice Management
sections.description: 15 prompts to help you run and grow your practice — operational frameworks, workflow documentation, capacity planning, and team management.

sections.title: Business Advisory & Growth
sections.description: 20 prompts for strategic advisory content that adds value beyond compliance — helping your clients plan, grow, and make better financial decisions.

sections.title: Additional Prompts
sections.description: 36 extra prompts spanning all practice areas for maximum coverage — giving you a prompt for virtually every situation you'll encounter.

whatsInside: Covers client communication, bookkeeping, tax, compliance, practice management, and business advisory
Each prompt includes example use cases and pro tips
Written in plain English with UK-specific terminology and regulations
Bracketed placeholders make every prompt easy to personalise
Works with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and any other AI tool
whoItsFor: Sole practitioner accountants who need to save time on admin and client communications
Bookkeepers who want professional templates for every situation
Small and mid-size accountancy practices looking to work more efficiently
Finance professionals who want to start using AI but don't know where to begin
Practice managers responsible for documentation, processes, and client correspondence

name: The Complete Beauty & Aesthetics AI Toolkit
description: 150+ AI prompts for salons, clinics, and beauty professionals — client communications, marketing and social media, bookings and promotions, treatment menus, salon operations, email marketing, business strategy, pricing, and brand expansion. Works with ChatGPT, Claude & Gemini.

overview.intro: Running a salon, clinic, or beauty business means you're constantly switching between treatments, client communications, marketing, and admin. This toolkit gives you 150+ ready-to-use AI prompts that handle the writing and planning so you can focus on your clients. Every prompt is written in plain English, designed for beauty and aesthetics professionals, and works with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or any other AI tool. Just pick a prompt, fill in the bracketed placeholders with your own business details, paste it into your AI tool, and you'll have a professional first draft in seconds.

sections.title: Client Communication & Retention
sections.description: 15 prompts for welcome messages, post-treatment follow-ups, review requests, lapsed client re-engagement, and retention communications.

sections.title: Marketing, Social Media & Content

sections.title: Sales, Bookings & Promotions

sections.title: Salon & Clinic Operations
sections.description: 20 prompts for onboarding checklists, health and safety policies, GDPR compliance, complaint handling, SOPs, and stock management.

sections.title: Email Marketing & Automation
sections.description: 15 prompts for welcome automations, rebooking reminders, newsletters, re-engagement sequences, and gift voucher campaigns.

sections.title: Business Strategy & Positioning
sections.description: 20 prompts for niche positioning, growth plans, brand voice development, membership models, and competitor analysis.

sections.title: Financial Management & Pricing

sections.title: Wholesale, Retail & Brand Expansion
